name: obsidian-live-transcriber
description: Obsidian plugin for live audio transcription with speaker diarization (MLX + MPS).

scripts.build: node scripts/embed-backend.mjs && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Valentino Labbate
